data.title: PAIDI Technology Debuts at Two Major Global Events of Chery, Empowering New Global Commercial Value with Chinese Innovative Manufacturing
data.description: In April 2026, PAIDI Technology showcased its products at two significant international gatherings organized by Chery Group in WUHU, China. The events attracted participants from around 100 nations and regions, including prominent global merchants. Key markets like Southeast Asia, Europe, and the Americas were extensively represented.

data.title: Envision Joins AEA Ammonia Certification System Pilot to Accelerate Global Clean Ammonia Trade
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Envision Energy, a renowned company in green technology, stated its involvement in the initial stage of the AEA Ammonia Certification System. This system was created by the Ammonia Energy Association (AEA) to streamline the certification process globally.

data.title: Bizzdesign Named a Leader in Strategic Portfolio Management Tools, Q2 2026 Report by Independent Research Firm
data.description: In the Dutch city of Enschede, Bizzdesign, a company specializing in enterprise transformation software, was recognized as a top player in The Forrester Wave™ report on Strategic Portfolio Management Tools for the second quarter of 2026. The assessment, which featured 13 key industry providers, highlighted Bizzdesign's leadership in this category.

data.title: Audited annual information of AB Kauno Energija for the year 2025
data.description: Below are the financial statements of AB Kauno Energija (company code 235014830) for 2025, prepared in accordance with the International Financial Reporting Standards adopted for use in the European Union. The Consolidated Annual Report and Independent Auditor's Conclusion were approved by the General Meeting of Shareholders.

data.title: Aegon publishes agenda for 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: Today, on April 29, 2026, Aegon made public the agenda for its upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM) set to take place on June 10, 2026. Interested parties can access the meeting materials, which include the agenda, on the specific Aegon AGM webpage.

data.title: Announcement on Results and additional information for Capital Markets Update event.
data.description: There has been a sharp increase in global COVID-19 cases, with over 200,000 new cases reported in the past 24 hours. The total number of confirmed cases worldwide now stands at 10 million, with the death toll surpassing 500,000. The United States remains the worst-affected country with over 2.5 million cases and 125,000 deaths. The World Health Organization has warned that the pandemic is far from over and called for continued vigilance to prevent further spread of the virus. Governments around the world are implementing various measures to curb the spread, including mandatory mask-wearing and social distancing regulations.

data.title: Resolutions of the General Meeting of Shareholders of AB Kauno Energija
data.description: On April 28, 2026, AB Kauno Energija convened its General Meeting of Shareholders, where 4 shareholders participated, collectively holding 42,268,075 ordinary registered shares representing 98.75% of all votes. During the meeting, several resolutions were adopted.
